recorder.title: Recorder
recorder.description: Start a local screen capture session and save the finished video.

settings.title: Capture settings
settings.description: Choose audio sources before starting the recording.
settings.systemAudioDescription: Ask the browser to include available tab or system audio.
settings.microphoneDescription: Add microphone audio to the recording when allowed.
settings.microphoneUnsupported: Microphone capture is not available in this browser.

output.title: Recording output
output.description: Preview the latest recording and download it as a local video file.
output.emptyDescription: Finish a recording to preview and download the video here.

alerts.unsupportedDescription: Use a browser with Screen Capture and MediaRecorder support, usually over HTTPS or localhost.
alerts.screenPermissionDescription: Start again and choose a screen, window, or tab in the browser prompt.
alerts.microphonePermissionDescription: Disable microphone capture or allow microphone access when prompted.
alerts.genericErrorDescription: Check browser permissions, close other capture sessions, and try again.
